title: verbascum ozturkii
intro: Verbascum ozturkii, also known as Ozturk's mullein, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Turkey. It belongs to the mullein family (Verbascum) and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and promote mucus clearance. Verbascum ozturkii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other ailments.
